| :---: | :---- |

| DATE 12th March 2026 | VENUE RARI, Durgapura, Jaipur | TIME 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM |
| :---: | :---: | :---: |
| *Organized by* **Aravali Entrepreneurship Foundation, Udaipur & SKNAU** *In collaboration with* **Agentics Foundation** |  |  |

**AGENDA**

| 9:00 – 9:30 AM | Opening Ceremony Prof. Dr Puspendra Singh Chauhan VC, SKNAU & Dilip Kumar Bharatee Chairman, Aravali Entrepreneurship Foundation |
| :---- | :---- |
| **9:30 – 10:00 AM** | **Address by the Minister of Higher Education, Government of Rajasthan Sh. Prem Chand Bairwa** |
| **10:00 – 10:30 AM** | **AI in Education: Agricultural Science and Trends in the US Education Sector** **Dr. Ganesh Bora — Keynote Speaker** Associate Vice Chancellor & Chief Research Officer, Fayetteville State University, University of North Carolina, USA |
| **10:30 – 11:00 AM** | **The AI Revolution in the Agricultural Sector and Venture Funding Opportunities** **Mr. Hemendra Mathur** Venture Partner & Co-Founder, Bharat Innovation Fund and ThinkAg |
| **11:00 – 11:30 AM** | **AI Development and Breathe Intelligence: Anxiebreathe** **Dr. Debanjan Borthakur** Doctoral Researcher in Human–AI Interaction, University of Toronto, Canada |
| **11:30 AM – 12:00 PM** | **AI for Dairy Science** **Ms. Archana Bharatee (IIM Mumbai)** Founder, Ecomscience Consulting Pvt. Ltd., Bangalore |
| **12:00 – 12:30 PM** | **Agentics Foundation: Resources and Network — From Ideation to Prototyping and Beyond** **Mr. Mondweep Chakravorty** Head of AI Strategy & Delivery, DxSure Ltd., UK · Coordinator, Agentics Foundation Assam |
| **12:30 – 1:00 PM** | **Generative AI MK3** **Goutam Das** Chief Innovator & Co-Founder, MountKan, Bangalore |
| **1:00 – 2:00 PM** | **Lunch Break** |
| **2:00 – 2:30 PM** | **Purnak.ai for real-world rural intelligence Mr. Muhammad Mokibul** CEO, XopunTech India Pvt. Ltd. |
| **2:30 – 3:00 PM** | **Moboscope™: Product Presentation** **Dr. Chayanika D. Nath** CEO, Labdig Innovations and Systems |
| **3:00 – 4:00 PM** | **AiClinic · AiSchool · AiFarming. AiLaxmi** **Dilip Kumar Bharatee** |
| **4:00 – 5:00 PM** | **Open House** |

**FEATURED SPEAKER**

| KEYNOTE SPEAKER Dr. Ganesh Bora Associate Vice Chancellor & Chief Research Officer, Fayetteville State University, University of North Carolina, USA Dr. Ganesh Bora is the Chief Research Officer and Associate Vice Chancellor of Research & Innovation at Fayetteville State University (FSU). He is also a Professor of Biological Engineering and Data Science at FSU and currently chairs the university's AI Task Force. He serves as a member of the U.S. Department of State's delegation for the Science and Technology Partnership with Africa. Prior to joining FSU, he was the National Program Leader for Advanced Technology Programs at the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA). He was also a member of the Networking and Information Technology Research and Development group for AI and Robotics under the Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) at the White House, and was part of the writing team for the 2023 National Artificial Intelligence Research and Development Strategic Plan. Dr. Bora earned his Ph.D. in Biological and Agricultural Engineering from Kansas State University, Manhattan, Kansas, USA; a Master of Engineering from the Asian Institute of Technology, Bangkok, Thailand; and a B.Tech in Agricultural Engineering from Jabalpur. |
| :---- |

**AI Summit · 12th March 2026 · Sri Karan Narendra Agricultural University, Jobner**

RARI, Durgapura, Jaipur, Rajasthan  ·  Aravali Entrepreneurship Foundation, Udaipur  ·  Agentic Foundation
